brief_html: This message will request a fast version check and parses the version check filename so the client does not have to. Now works with all products.
format:
(UINT32) Product ID.*
(UINT32) Flags.**
(UINT32) Cookie.
(FILETIME) Timestamp for version check archive.
(STRING) Version check archive filename.
(STRING) Checksum formula.
remarks_html:
This message will request a fast version check and parses the version check filename so the client does not have to. Now works with all products.

See the BNLS Product Codes document for a list of valid product codes.

** Currently there are no flags defined, this must be set to zero.
